page_metadata.biotools__summary: Python tool to generate pseudorandom series for human and non-human animal behavioural experiments. It includes both a graphical user interface (GUI) as well as a simple Python API.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Python tool to generate pseudorandom series for human and non-human animal behavioural experiments. It includes both a graphical user interface (GUI) as well as a simple Python API.
